hero.subtitle: Made by hand in Bandung. For the mornings that ask nothing of you, and the days that ask everything.

featured.title: From the Collection
featured.subtitle: Pieces that earn their place in your wardrobe

brandIntro.subtitle: Designed in Bandung. Woven from 100% European linen. Cut for women who move through the world at their own pace.

signature.subtitle: Each piece is made to live in — to soften with wear, to carry you through the ordinary and the beautiful.

testimonials.subtitle: From Our Customers
testimonials.desc: Real words from women who've made linen a part of how they live.

whatsapp.subtitle: Talk to Us
whatsapp.desc: Reach the Julia Owers team directly on WhatsApp — for sizing, care questions, or simply to find what fits you.
whatsapp.waMessage: Hi Julia Owers! I'd love to know more about your linen collection.

footer.brand: Linen made slowly, made well. For the woman who knows what she wants — and takes her time getting there.

shop.title: The Catalogue
shop.quote: "To buy less. To choose well. To make it last."

about.p1: In our Bandung atelier, there is no rush. There is only the weight of good linen, the rhythm of the needle, and the quiet discipline of making something that will outlast a season.
about.p2: Julia Owers was born in Bandung — where Europe's finest linen traditions meet the hands of Indonesian craftswomen. Every piece is cut, sewn, and finished in-house, under the same roof, with a fair wage and a careful eye.
about.p3: Our clothes are meant to be lived in. They soften as you wear them, breathe in the heat, and grow more beautiful with time. Made for women who prefer meaning over noise.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Questions about sizing, orders, or just curious about a piece? We're always glad to hear from you.
contact.name: Name

contact.sentDesc: Thank you for writing in. We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
